author: thornewolf
name: Document-Boundary Attention Gate (FlexAttention)
blurb: Non-record experiment forked from train_gpt_apr_14.py: restrict attention so each token only sees prior tokens within its own document in the packed sequence. Document IDs are derived per-batch from the SentencePiece boundary LUT (cumsum of is_boundary_token); a FlexAttention BlockMask folds causal and same-doc constraints into one kernel. Single-seed result beats the train_gpt_apr_14.py baseline by ~0.0028 nats val_loss (~0.0017 bpb) — positive but below the 0.005-nat record bar.
